Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0900 "ICEPALACE-KTEL-C000-0900" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ice Palace (K-tel) (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C000 to setup the correct VICII display settings before starting the game
Note: to dump the game, use an NTSC setup
